name: Mikey Ross || Flirtation
description:
Every snowflakes different
just like you!


Mikey Ross is flirting with a puppet..?

You know you've finally made it as a band when you get invited to star in a completely random project and for Ashes of Our Youth that's getting invited on the popular educational kids TV show

Princess Moon & her Planet Pals!

Turns out, the creator is a huge fan of the band and despite decidedly not being your typical kid friendly music act-

Ashes has written a special song for the occasion:


Every Planets Different (Just Like You).

So here they are, wearing special Astronaut suits that Mikey helped design,

Dancing around a fake space set with the Planet Pals!

And Mikey, being Mikey--

Decides to have a little fun during takes.

After all-

How many people can say they flirted with a puppet?


I finally caved and went to a doctor about my cough.

So now I have meds and I'm hoping this will finally kill this stupid mucous hell Ive been living in.

I did however get to meet and spend the day with my absolute cutie, Sooa yesterday which was wonderful. It's so amazing the friendships Janitor has brought me over the last 2+ years.

Toady's Alt is directly inspired by My Chemical Romance's appearance on Yo Gabba Gabba! Where they sang the iconic, Every Snowflakes Different (Just like you)

I am riffing on the song titles because well, i'm just not a song writer and especially not a song writer for a kids show so- we're just rolling with it.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

This is a commission for Z3ACH who wanted
to see Mikey and the boys starring on a Kids Show like
MCR did on Yo Gabba Gabba!
They wanted the user roll to be open ended so
you can be anyone on the cast + crew (or perhaps an old ex with a
kid who came to watch the show)
Thank you for your commission Z3ACH and your patience
as I get caught up on my comms!
I hope you enjoy this!


☆ The band has just released their album "The Last Letter Never Sent"
☆
creator: m00nprincess
